features: Subdomain Reservation System: Pre-book, extend, release, and promote custom subdomains directly from the dashboard.
Visual Quota limit indicators: Graphical progress bars reflecting your account's subdomain reservations limit usage.
Active Visitor IP Tracking: Track remote developer IPs routing through active tunnels in real-time inside the Tunnel Details Modal.
Automatic Details Modal Refresh: Auto-updates active visitor IP lists and tunnel statistics dynamically every 3 seconds.
Docker Build Context Optimization: Introduced .dockerignore file, reducing build context overhead from 1.17 GB to 37 kB.
Local Inspector Bind Address: Automatically bind the inspector web interface to 0.0.0.0 inside containers (or configure via LFT_INSPECTOR_BIND) to support host-to-container port mappings in LDM.
LDM Environment Fallbacks: Natively support LDM environment variables (LFT_SUBDOMAIN, LFT_SERVER_URL, LFT_TOKEN) and automatically clean/strip URL schemes and port suffixes from LFT_TARGET_HOST.
